form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Lakeside (22.20) in a Free For All, finishing a 5.5 lengths fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from six starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 520m at this track beaten 10 lengths (30.40) behind Breakout Lad in a Mix 5 on April 9. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.
